title: NotTooExpensivePro
description: Removes the "Too Expensive!" limit from anvils. Install, forget, done.
body:
# NotTooExpensivePro

**Tired of "Too Expensive!" blocking your best gear?**  
NotTooExpensivePro silently removes the vanilla XP cap on anvils.  
No GUI. No commands to learn. No setup required.

---

## ✅ How It Works

Vanilla Minecraft blocks anvil operations that cost more than 39 levels.  
NotTooExpensivePro intercepts that — any operation over 39 levels gets  
capped to exactly **39 levels**. You pay 39, you get your item. Done.

Operations already under 39 levels are **untouched** — full vanilla behavior.

---

## ⚙️ Features

- Removes the "Too Expensive!" block entirely
- Operations over 39 levels are capped at **39 levels**
- Operations under 39 levels behave exactly like vanilla
- Per-world toggle — enable only in worlds you choose
- `/ntep reload` to reload config without restart
- **Zero dependencies** — most anvil plugins require PacketEvents or ProtocolLib  
  to manipulate the anvil UI at a packet level. NotTooExpensivePro needs **nothing**.  
  No extra JARs to download, no version mismatches, no plugin conflicts. Just drop and go.

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Drop `NotTooExpensivePro.jar` into your `/plugins` folder
2. Restart your server
3. That's it. Seriously.
> 💡 **No PacketEvents. No ProtocolLib. No dependencies at all.**  
> Most plugins that touch the anvil UI require heavy packet libraries.  
> NotTooExpensivePro uses only the built-in Bukkit/Paper API — nothing else needed.

---

## 🔧 Config
```yaml
anvil:
  enabled-worlds: []  # empty = all worlds
```

---

## 🔗 Looking for more anvil control?
